title: The Water Gipsies
writer: John Paddy Carstairs, Basil Dean, A.P. Herbert
actors: Ann Todd, Sari Maritza, Ian Hunter
plot: Jane Bell has lived on an old barge moored in the Thames with her feckless father and sister ever since their mother died, but she would prefer her life to be more like the movies; reality is being courted by inarticulate boatman ...
